projectName: AuthAgent: Decentralized Identity for Autonomous AI
hackathon: Authorized to Act: Auth0 for AI Agents | $10,000 | Deadline: Mar 02 - Apr 07, 2026
description: AuthAgent builds upon the Microsoft AutoGen framework to create autonomous agents that possess their own cryptographic identity (DID) on-chain. Unlike traditional agents that rely on centralized API keys or human-signed transactions, AuthAgent agents generate a unique wallet address and register it on a smart contract registry. The system implements a 'Capability Binding' primitive where specific smart contract functions (e.g., transfer, approve) are bound to the agent's DID, allowing the agent
angle: First AI agent framework with native Decentralized Identity (DID) support for autonomous transaction signing, enabling agents to prove ownership of their actions without human intervention.
